Our Instructors Class Schedule Reviews News

Meet Our Coaching Staff

13 dedicated instructors. Decades of combined experience in Judo, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, and more.

Head Instructor & Owner, 4th Degree BJJ Black Belt
Head Instructor

Jamie Cruz

Head Instructor & Owner, 4th Degree BJJ Black Belt

Jamie Cruz began training Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu in 1994 under the legendary Renzo Gracie. By 2003, Renzo awarded Jamie his black belt — making him just the 7th practitioner ever to receive a black belt from the acclaimed martial artist. Now a 4th Degree Black Belt, Jamie has trained UFC-caliber fighters including Jim Miller, Dan Miller, Charlie Brenneman, and Dillon Danis, and is one of the most respected instructors in New Jersey. His philosophy centers on building a framework of proven success for every student — beginner to competitor.

Co-Founder & 6th Dan Judo Black Belt
Co-Founder

Tony Camal

Co-Founder & 6th Dan Judo Black Belt

Anthony “Tony” Camal began his Judo journey in 1967 at age six, eventually becoming a Junior Olympic National Champion (1978), High School National Champion (1979), and three-time Senior National medalist. He opened Camal Judo in 1996, building it into one of New Jersey’s most decorated Judo academies — producing dozens of Junior National Champions, over 10 Senior National medal winners, and 30+ black belts. A career firefighter promoted to Captain, Tony was named USA Judo Amateur Coach of the Year by the U.S. Olympic Committee in 2014. Sensei Camal passed away on July 29, 2024. His legacy endures in every student he trained and in the academy that bears his name.

Head Judo Instructor
Judo Department

Chris Skelly

Head Judo Instructor

Chris Skelly stepped into the role of Head Judo Instructor following the passing of his Sensei, Anthony “Tony” Camal, in 2024. Trained directly under Sensei Camal, Chris carries forward the same rigorous technical standards and competitive spirit that made Camal Judo one of the most decorated academies in New Jersey. He is committed to honoring his Sensei’s legacy by continuing to develop the next generation of Judo champions at Camal & Cruz.

Ready to Train With Us?

Your first class is completely free — no experience needed, all ages welcome.

Camal & Cruz Judo & Jiu Jitsu

Camal & Cruz Judo & Jiu Jitsu is Totowa’s premier martial arts academy. We develop champions on and off the mats through world-class instruction and a supportive community.
